data.name: Love n Dream: Virtual Happiness
data.detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON Q1 2022 ❤



關於此遊戲

功能

  • 拖動您的卡牌以與環境卡牌進行互動以完成每個關卡。
  • 收藏物品：在整個關卡，玩家將有機會從角色或環境卡牌中取回收藏物品以能夠更多地了解女孩們。
  • 許多不同的RPG卡牌類型可貢玩家做出各種獨特的選擇決定。
  • 許多來自不同設計的卡哇伊女孩正在等著你！
  • 各種互動會隨著角色發展而出現。
  • 許多圖庫功能.
  • 每個人物都具有不同個性的可愛聲音。

  • 收藏物品：在整個關卡，玩家將有機會從角色或環境卡牌中取回收藏物品以能夠更多地了解女孩們。

  • 許多來自不同設計的卡哇伊女孩正在等著你！

data.short_description: 《愛與夢：虛擬幸福》是一款帶有RPG風采的卡牌益智遊戲。您的工作是帶領不同的女孩在虛擬現實遊戲中提高冒險水平與和她的感情。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel Pentium D 830 (2 * 3000) or equivalent
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 610 (1024 MB) or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Love n Dream: Virtual Happiness
data.detailed_description:
❤ COMING SOON Q1 2022 ❤



About the Game

Features

  • Drag your card to interact with the environment cards to complete each level.
  • Collectible Item - along all the stage, player will have chances to retrieve items from character and understand more about them.
  • Many different RPG card types to make various unique choice decisions.
  • Many kawaii girls from different designs are waiting for you!!
  • Various interactions follow up with the character.
  • Cute voice with different personalities from every character.
  • Gallery and character viewer features.
  • Good luck and happy ending!!
data.about_the_game:
Features

  • Drag your card to interact with the environment cards to complete each level.
  • Collectible Item - along all the stage, player will have chances to retrieve items from character and understand more about them.
  • Many different RPG card types to make various unique choice decisions.

  • Gallery and character viewer features.
  • Good luck and happy ending!!
data.short_description: 《Love n Dream: Virtual Happiness》is a card-based puzzle game with RPG components. Your job is to lead different girls to advance their adventure levels in a Virtual Reality Game.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel Pentium D 830 (2 * 3000) or equivalent
  • Graphics: Geforce GT 610 (1024 MB) or equivalent
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
